task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, must start and end with letter or number).
Create a JSON object representing an AWS IAM policy that allows read-only access to a specific S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS ARN (Amazon Resource Name) format: arn:partition:service:region:account-id:resource.
